channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lamar Jackson repeats and Ja’Marr Chase and Justin Jefferson are unanimous choices for AP All-Pro
item.description: Lamar Jackson beat out Josh Allen, and Ja’Marr Chase and Justin Jefferson are unanimous choices for The Associated Press 2024 NFL All-Pro Team. Saquon Barkley received 48 of 50 first-place votes and Patrick Surtain II got 49 from a nationwide panel of media members who regularly cover the league.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: All-Bay Area News Group 2024 high school football team
item.description: Hundreds of players throughout the region honored by high school staff at Mercury News, East Bay Times.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: BUCS BONUS: Tampa Bay looking for similar results in Wild Card rematch against Washington
item.description: With the Buccaneers gearing up for their fifth straight Post Season run, Barber joins a special episode of Bucs Bonus to talk about what the team needs to do to contain rookie quarterback phenom Jayden Daniels and the Washington Commanders offense that has leveled up since the two teams met in week
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UT Voice Craig Way discusses all things Longhorns ahead of playoff game against Ohio State
item.description: The Texas Longhorns are gearing up for a monumental face-off against the Ohio State Buckeyes at the College Football Playoffs semifinal.
item.dc:creator: Randy McIlvoy, KPRC 2

item.title: After season-ending ACL tear, Mitty star McKenna Woliczko charts long path forward for recovery
item.description: Archbishop Mitty All-America forward McKenna Woliczko has a long road ahead of her to return to the court. Here's what it will take for the junior star to make it back.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets, Jaguars and Browns to play home games in London in 2025, with Jacksonville at Wembley again
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Cleveland, Jacksonville and the New York Jets each will play a home game in London in 2025. The NFL announced the host teams Friday. Their opponents will be revealed, along with dates and kickoff times, when the full 2025 schedule is released this spring.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Iga Swiatek and Jannik Sinner discuss their doping cases ahead of the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek, a self-described “control freak,” is taking new precautions — including holding on to extra samples of medicine she takes, in case they need to be tested at some point — after a doping case she described Friday as “probably, like, the worst time in my life.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck enters transfer portal and delays NFL draft plans, reports say
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia quarterback Carson Beck appears to be rethinking his plans for 2025, less than two weeks after announcing he would enter the NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brayden Point reaches 600 career points in Lightning's 4-1 victory over the Bruins
item.description: Brayden Point reached 600 career points with a power-play goal, Andrei Vasilevskiy made 27 saves, and the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Boston Bruins 4-1 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Rams' playoff game moved to Arizona as wildfires disrupt sports in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL moved the Los Angeles Rams’ playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings out of Southern California on Thursday, the biggest of several changes to the sports calendar after days of devastating wildfires in the area.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Vikings-Rams playoff game moved away from Los Angeles due to wildfires
item.description: The NFL announced Thursday that the playoff game between the Vikings and Rams has been moved from southern California to Arizona due to the wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tim Tebow issues prayer to 'bring rain to California,' sends thoughts to locals during wildfires
item.description: Former college football star and Heisman Trophy winner Tim Tebow issued an emotional prayer for those battling wildfires in California on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Comedian Shane Gillis says Nick Saban ‘spazzed on me’ after ESPN on-air appearance
item.description: Shane Gillis, the famous comedian, revealed that legendary college football coach Nick Saban "spazzed on me" after making jokes that he had cheated while at Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Female athletes were 'emotionally blackmailed' over SJSU trans volleyball scandal, Riley Gaines says
item.description: Witnesses opened up on the "terror" that college women's volleyball players experienced this season amid a national scandal involving a transgender player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard continues hot stretch, career-best point streak at 8 games as Blackhawks beat Avalanche
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard is on a hot streak, even if the Blackhawks haven't been too hot lately. Bedard continued his roll on Wednesday night with a goal and an assist, and this time it led to a win, as the Blackhawks beat the Colorado Avalanche, 3-1, at the United Center.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Thune tees up Tuberville's bill to block transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) on Tuesday took the necessary procedural steps to place Sen. Tommy Tuberville’s (R-Ala.) bill blocking transgender athletes from women’s sports on the Senate calendar. The step sets up a vote on Tuberville’s bill in the weeks ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Former Baltimore Orioles left-hander Brian Matusz, who made final MLB appearance with Cubs in 2016, dies at 37
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Brian Matusz, the left-handed pitcher who spent eight seasons in the major leagues and made his final big-league appearance with the Cubs during their 2016 World Series championship season, has died. He was 37. Matusz, a former No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: St. Patrick names former Notre Dame star Tom Zbikowski head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO — One of the best safeties in Notre Dame's storied football program was named head coach of Saint Patrick High School. Tom Zbikowski, 39, will take over the Northwest Side high school's football program.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies avoid upset at San Jose State, 85-78
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - In their first game of the season as a ranked team, the Utah State basketball team avoided a major upset at San Jose State Tuesday night. Mason Falslev had 17 points and seven rebounds, Tucker Anderson added 15 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Peter Seidler's brother responds to lawsuit over control of Padres
item.description: Matt Seidler, the brother of late Padres owner Peter Seidler, has responded to the lawsuit filed by Peter Seidler's widow over control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Zac Blair tries to regain PGA Tour status
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The first full field event of the season on the PGA Tour, the Hawaiian Open, tees off on Thursday. Former BYU star Zac Blair flew out to Hawaii to try to Monday qualify because he no longer has full status on the tour.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Jaguars return home after getting stuck on Indianapolis tarmac for 7 hours during storm
item.description: The Jacksonville Jaguars returned home early Monday after spending seven hours waiting through a winter storm on the tarmac at Indianapolis International Airport.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
